description: Architect child: sequential thinking to transform discovery and exploration into executable subtask plan with decision rationale

steps.title: Problem definition branches
steps.description: Create at least 2 interpretation branches for {{task_id}} via sequential thinking (stage=Problem Definition). Hard gate: must call process_thought at least once.

steps.title: Approach candidates
steps.description: Generate at least 2 implementation approaches for {{task_id}} via sequential thinking (stage=Analysis). Each includes strategy, pros/cons, effort, risk, and downstream impact.

steps.title: Synthesis and comparison
steps.description: Generate summary to verify stage coverage, then synthesize comparison of approaches for {{task_id}} (stage=Synthesis). Recommend chosen approach with rationale.

steps.title: Decision and subtask plan
steps.description: Record decision and define implementation subtask list for {{task_id}} (stage=Conclusion). Each subtask specifies: description, files, success criteria. Forward Interface Appendix verbatim from explore phase.

steps.title: Export thinking session
steps.description: Export sequential thinking session to .kilocode/thinking/task-{{task_id}}-prep-{{date}}.json. Hard gate: must call export_session before completing.

steps.title: Return preparation summary
steps.description: Return structured preparation summary for {{task_id}}: decision, success criteria, ordered subtask list, risks/mitigations, interface appendix, session export path, runtime attestation.
